text.title: QA Release Candidate Smoke Pack Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the qa-rc-smoke-pack-template methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: draft-steps
step.action: Write ≤10 scripted steps covering the paths.

step.name: script-each
step.action: Translate each into a single command with binary output.

step.name: dry-run
step.action: Time the pack; ensure ≤5 min and all steps deterministic.

step.name: wire-gate
step.action: Connect pack to RC promotion gate; failure blocks promotion.
